description: Identifies unused module-defined Puppet functions via static analysis of the environment directory on the Primary Server. Covers Puppet-language functions (functions/*.pp), modern Ruby API functions (lib/puppet/functions/), and legacy Ruby functions (lib/puppet/parser/functions/). Built-in Puppet language functions are never included — discovery is scoped exclusively to module directories.

environment.description: Puppet environment to analyse. Defaults to 'production'.

env_dir.description: Absolute path to the environment directory on the Primary Server. Defaults to the path derived from `puppet config print environmentpath` and the environment parameter (e.g. /etc/puppetlabs/code/environments/production).
